# CWE-807: Reliance on Untrusted Inputs in a Security Decision
lang: go
file: CWE-807-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var blockedIPs = map[string]struct{}{"203.0.113.50": {}}

// Vulnerable: IP block decision trusts a client-controlled X-Forwarded-For header.
func GateSensitiveAction(c *gin.Context) {
	clientIP := c.GetHeader("X-Forwarded-For")
	if idx := strings.Index(clientIP, ","); idx >= 0 {
		clientIP = strings.TrimSpace(clientIP[:idx])
	}
	if _, blocked := blockedIPs[clientIP]; blocked {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
